title: Component Props
description: Create a reusable custom component that accepts a 'title' prop and displays it inside a Text tag.
problemStatement:
Dynamic components! Define a functional component `Heading(props)`. It should return a `Text` element showing whatever string is passed to its `title` prop.

**Requirement:** Use props to access the data.
hints: Props allow you to customize components every time you use them.
expectedOutput: Text rendered based on the title prop passed by the parent
